info.name: Order Payment API
info.description: Extendable Order and Payment Management API with JWT authentication.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Register the same email twice. The second request should fail.

response.name: 422 Email Already Registered
422 Weak Password
422 Password Mismatch
422 Invalid Email
422 Multiple Errors
422 Missing Name
200 OK
401 Unauthorized
401 Unauthorized
422 Validation Failed
422 Missing Password

request.description: Send more than 5 login requests per minute from the same IP to trigger rate limiting.

response.name: 429 Too Many Requests
200 OK
200 OK - No Orders
422 Invalid Status Filter
422 Invalid per_page
422 Invalid page
401 Unauthorized
201 Created

request.description: First item is missing quantity. API returns a customer-friendly validation error.

response.name: 422 Missing Item Quantity
422 Validation Failed
422 Invalid Status on Create
401 Unauthorized
200 OK

request.description: Use a non-existent order ID or an order owned by another user.

response.name: 404 Not Found
404 Route Not Found
200 OK
422 Invalid Status
422 Empty Update Body
404 Order Not Found

request.description: Use an order that already has a successful payment.

response.name: 422 Order Locked
409 Conflict
201 Payment Successful

request.description: Send a second payment request after the order already has a successful payment.

response.name: 422 Order Already Paid
201 Failed Payment Recorded
201 Payment Successful

request.description: Use an order whose customer_email contains fail@ (e.g. fail@example.com).

response.name: 201 Failed Payment Recorded

request.description: Use a confirmed order whose total does NOT end in .99 (e.g. 100.00).

response.name: 201 Payment Successful

request.description: Use a confirmed order whose total ends in .99 (e.g. 19.99).

response.name: 201 Failed Payment Recorded
422 Missing Card Number
422 Missing Payment Method
422 Invalid Payment Method
422 Invalid Card Number
422 Unsupported Metadata Key
422 Order Not Confirmed
404 Order Not Found
200 OK

request.description: Use a non-existent order ID or an order owned by another user.

response.name: 404 Not Found
200 OK

  "data": [
